declarations.description:
A comprehensive configuration dialog for managing application settings.
Allows users to toggle dark mode, change color themes, adjust contrast,
and customize Floating Action Button (FAB) behaviors.

declarations.description:
A reusable section component for profile-related content.
Uses container queries to provide a responsive grid layout that adapts to available space.

API
--
declarations.name: InfoSection

members.name: sectionTitle
members.description:
The text shown in the section heading (`

`). Corresponds to the attribute `section-title`. Slot API -- : (required) Container for section body content. Preserves the responsive grid layout. Example: ```html
...your list, cards, or details...
```

attributes.name: section-title
attributes.description:
The text shown in the section heading (`

`). Corresponds to the attribute `section-title`. Slot API -- : (required) Container for section body content. Preserves the responsive grid layout. Example: ```html
...your list, cards, or details...
```

declarations.description: A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.
declarations.name: WordCloud

cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation

cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height

cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size

cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.
cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height

members.name: appearance
members.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

members.name: delay
members.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

members.name: grouping
members.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

members.name: instantClear
members.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

members.name: sorting
members.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

members.name: threshold
members.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

members.name: words
members.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

A component for displaying professional work experience entries.  Supports nesting
for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.

declarations.default: { INFO: "info" as const, WORK: "work" as const, CODE: "code" as const, BLOG: "blog" as const, // SETTINGS: "settings" as const, // CONNECT: "connect" as const, }

declarations.description: A factory function to create a WordCloudWord

declarations.default: { SIMULTANEOUS: "simultaneous" as const, SEQUENTIAL: "sequential" as const, }

declarations.default: { CATEGORY: "category" as const, QUARTILE: "quartile" as const, UNGROUPED: "ungrouped" as const, }

declarations.name: WordCloudSortings

type.text:
{
  BY_WEIGHT: "by-weight" as const,
  BY_WEIGHT_REVERSED: "by-weight-reversed" as const,
  BY_ALPHABET: "by-alphabet" as const,
  BY_ALPHABET_REVERSED: "by-alphabet-reversed" as const,
  NONE: "none" as const,
}

declarations.default: { BY_WEIGHT: "by-weight" as const, BY_WEIGHT_REVERSED: "by-weight-reversed" as const, BY_ALPHABET: "by-alphabet" as const, BY_ALPHABET_REVERSED: "by-alphabet-reversed" as const, NONE: "none" as const, }

declarations.name: DEFAULT_APP_CONFIGS
declarations.default: { colorScheme: { theme: THEME_NAMES.sunset, name: CONFIG_COLOR_SCHEME_NAMES.SYSTEM, contrast: CONFIG_COLOR_CONTRAST_NAMES.NORMAL, persist: false, } as const, fab: { settings: { position: FAB_POSITION.START_BOTTOM, style: FAB_STYLE.ICON_AND_TEXT, } as const, connect: { position: FAB_POSITION.END_BOTTOM, style: FAB_STYLE.ICON_AND_TEXT, } as const, } as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION
declarations.default: { START_TOP: "START_TOP" as const, START_BOTTOM: "START_BOTTOM" as const, END_TOP: "END_TOP" as const, END_BOTTOM: "END_BOTTOM" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION_COMPONENTS_HORIZONTAL
declarations.default: { START: "START" as const, END: "END" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_POSITION_COMPONENTS_VERTICAL
declarations.default: { TOP: "TOP" as const, BOTTOM: "BOTTOM" as const, }

declarations.name: FAB_STYLE
declarations.default: { ICON_ONLY: "ICON_ONLY" as const, ICON_AND_TEXT: "ICON_AND_TEXT" as const, ICON_ONLY_SMALL: "ICON_ONLY_SMALL" as const, TEXT_ONLY: "TEXT_ONLY" as const, }

declarations.name: FabPositionIcons
declarations.default: { START_TOP: html`<md-icon slot="start">subheader</md-icon>`, // The missing `position_top_left` to match the others END_TOP: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_top_right</md-icon>`, END_BOTTOM: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_bottom_right</md-icon>`, START_BOTTOM: html`<md-icon slot="start">position_bottom_left</md-icon>`, }

declarations.name: CONFIG_COLOR_CONTRAST_NAMES
declarations.default: { NORMAL: "NORMAL" as const, MEDIUM: "MEDIUM" as const, HIGH: "HIGH" as const, }

declarations.name: CONFIG_COLOR_SCHEME_NAMES
declarations.default: { DARK: "DARK" as const, LIGHT: "LIGHT" as const, SYSTEM: "SYSTEM" as const, }
